texto: Boys this is only a game. But it's like life in that you will be dealt some bad hands. Take each hand good or bad and don't whine and complain but play it out. If you're men enough to do that God will help and you will come out well.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dwight D. Eisenhower's mother: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Boys this is only a game. But it's like life in that you will be dealt some bad hands. Take each …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, acceptance, dealt pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
